title: Teerathgarh Falls
tagline: Teerathgarh Falls — heritage city of Chhattisgarh

overview.short: The Thirathgarh Falls is an all season tourism site and well-photographed waterfall near Jagdalpur at Kanger Ghati in Bastar district in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.
overview.description: The Thirathgarh Falls is an all season tourism site and well-photographed waterfall near Jagdalpur at Kanger Ghati in Bastar district in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.

topPlaces.name: Darbha, Chhattisgarh
topPlaces.description: Darbha is a town in Bastar district, Chhattisgarh, India.

topPlaces.name: 2013 Naxal attack in Darbha valley
topPlaces.description: On 25 May 2013, Naxalite insurgents of the Communist Party of India (Maoist) attacked a convoy of Indian National Congress leaders in the Jhiram Ghati, Darbha Valley in the Sukma district of Chhattisgarh, India. The attack caused at least 27 deaths, including that of former state minister Mahendra Karma and Chhattisgarh Congress chief Nand Kumar Patel.

topPlaces.name: Kotumsar Cave
topPlaces.description: Kotumsar Cave is a limestone cave located near Jagdalpur in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh. It is situated on the Kanger limestone belt close to the bank of the Kanger River and lies within Kanger Valley National Park.

items.note: Darbha is a town in Bastar district, Chhattisgarh, India.

On 25 May 2013, Naxalite insurgents of the Communist Party of India (Maoist) attacked a convoy of Indian National Congress leaders in the Jhiram Ghati, Darbha Valley in the Sukma district of Chhattisgarh, India. The attack caused at least 27 deaths, including that of former state minister Mahendra Karma and Chhattisgarh Congress chief Nand Kumar Patel.

Kotumsar Cave is a limestone cave located near Jagdalpur in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh. It is situated on the Kanger limestone belt close to the bank of the Kanger River and lies within Kanger Valley National Park.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Teerathgarh Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Teerathgarh Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Teerathgarh Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (195 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (201 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Teerathgarh Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Teerathgarh Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Teerathgarh Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Teerathgarh Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Teerathgarh Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Darbha, Chhattisgarh, 2013 Naxal attack in Darbha valley, Kotumsar Cave.
